summary: Decent sound mix captures the historic first live renditions of The Wheel (and Samson & Delilah) plus a mellow Help on the Way > Slipknot segment.
review: The recording offers a clear enough mix, though some listeners note that Garcia’s soaring lead lines are less pronounced than on studio releases. Fans appreciate the historic first performances of The Wheel and Samson & Delilah, and the sweet Help > Slipknot sequence is singled out as a mellow highlight. Playback on ordinary PA systems can sound harsh, so personal listening environments are recommended.

ai_rating.rationale: Reviews praise the historic set pieces and overall decent mix but lack detailed technical appraisal; moderate star scores (average ~3) lead to a middling rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice sound mix noted, though guitar detail is less crisp than studio versions; no major drop‑outs reported but PA playback can emphasize flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Historically significant set featuring first live versions of The Wheel and Samson & Delilah, with a smooth, mellow Help > Slipknot transition.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s lead guitar lacks the high‑flying licks of the studio version, though overall performance is solid.
